query:
-- What fields do unmatched services have populated?
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN phoneNumber IS NOT NULL AND phoneNumber != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_phone,
  SUM(CASE WHEN simSerialNumber IS NOT NULL AND simSerialNumber != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_sim,
  SUM(CASE WHEN locationAddress IS NOT NULL AND locationAddress != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_address,
  SUM(CASE WHEN customerName IS NOT NULL AND customerName != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_custname,
  SUM(CASE WHEN supplierAccount IS NOT NULL AND supplierAccount != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_supplier_acct,
  COUNT(*) AS total
FROM services
WHERE (customerExternalId IS NULL OR customerExternalId = '');
